case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC. VS. KAC TRUCKING LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 74114718) TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-07-2025 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 74114718) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KAC TRUCKING LLC DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-2025
DECLARATION RE: SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT VIA CERTIFIED MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 75001250) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 77075584) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU,INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUL-14-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE OCT-07-2025 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
